org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

类 ProviderBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractBuilder<T,B>
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractMethodBuilder<T,B>
        • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractInterfaceBuilder<T,B>
          • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractServiceBuilder<ProviderConfig,ProviderBuilder>
            • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ProviderBuilder

  • public class ProviderBuilder
extends AbstractServiceBuilder<ProviderConfig,ProviderBuilder>
    This is a builder for build ProviderConfig.
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7
